data_coverage_summary: Paccurate API has public documentation that indicates yard, dock, and shipment coordination workflows across trailers, appointments, docks, shipments. Public API docs.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for dock, trailer, and yard-coordination workflows rather than telemetry ingestion. Paccurate should be treated as a rest api surface for yard, dock, and shipment coordination workflows.

available_data.category: Yard, dock, and shipment coordination workflows
available_data.description: The public documentation indicates yard and dock coordination workflows for shipments, trailers, appointments, and carrier-facing operations.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Paccurate API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as yard, dock, and shipment coordination workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
